title: The God’s Knights Move on Elbaf
description: On pages 6–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Saturn, Ripley, Robin, Unknown person #6 as The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.
scene: The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You sure you want it now?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Yeah, sorry for the trouble.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Here... allow me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You asked me to bring it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: from egghead.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What's inside it though?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Inside?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Why, it's one of me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Another vegapunk?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, but this clone's different from us satellites. It's a perfect copy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I used it to visit this island 20 years ago!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stella couldn't exactly leave the lab for months at a time without those government dogs noticing!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now then, let's stop dilly-dallying and get to it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've already added the cultivation fluid, but we won't be able to do a safe extraction till I make the necessary equipment!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's why I intend to build a new lab right here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Lilith! Will that make it possible...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: _For you to help papa, too?

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: That's the plan, Bonney!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yahoo!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you really are vegapunk, then I'm thrilled to see ya after 20 long years...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I don't get it... why're you a woman?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Oh that? There's a perfectly logical explanation.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: SIR!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Are you done? Can we play now?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: My bad, kids.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: come on out. Thanks for waiting.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those likes use the spring area as a playground,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We had them hold off, so they wouldn't spoil Mr. Saul's performance.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You went that far?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I apologize for the belated introduction...

dialogue.speaker: Ripley
dialogue.text: I'm ange, an assistant teacher here.

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Librarian (Saul's Assistant) ANGE

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't mean to brag, but this is Elbaf's number one school and library.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let me give you a tour of the premises...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: wooo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That sounds fun!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Not so fast!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't wait to see how Elbaf raises its mighty warriors!!!

dialogue.speaker: Ripley
dialogue.text: This is Walrus folk School.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mr. Saul opened it 20 years ago at our late King's request.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This is gonna be a blast!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Woohooo!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a training school for young warriors, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: GORD, ANGE, YOU GO ON!

dialogue.speaker: Ripley
dialogue.text: show them all around the school.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm gonna take Robin...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...Straight to the library!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Are you coming, chopper?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wanna check out the library, too! I bet the books are massive!

dialogue.speaker: Ripley
dialogue.text: Schools always make me nostalgic!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll tag along and keep you safe, nami-san!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'm more interested in that giant tree.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yeah. It's huge.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Let's catch these shorties,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: And play prisoners!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Dahya Hya Hya!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Man, this really is a country of giants!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Should I cut 'em?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: No, you idiot!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These giants are just kids! Be the mature one!

summary: This part advances the Loki and the Holy Knights through 60 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
